items.title: 'He shares our values.' Timken Co. lands its new CEO
items.description: Stark County-based Timken Co. has found its new CEO. Find out who got the job.

items.title: Timken Names Lucian Boldea President and Chief Executive Officer
items.description: The Timken Company (NYSE: TKR; www.timken.com), a global technology leader in engineered bearings and industrial motion, today announced that its Board of Directors has appointed Lucian Boldea the company's president and CEO and member of the Board, effective Sept. 1, 2025. Boldea will succeed Richard G. Kyle, who has been in an interim role since March after having previously served as president and CEO from 2014 to 2024.

items.title: Air Taxi Market Forecast and Company Analysis 2025-2033 Featuring Honeywell International, AB Corporate Aviation, Skyway, Airbus, Kitty Hawk, Fly Aeolus, Neva Aerospace, Hyundai, Joby, Talkeetna
items.description: The Global Air Taxi Market is set to soar from USD 1.32 billion in 2024 to USD 7.74 billion by 2033, with a CAGR of 21.72%. This growth is fueled by advancements in electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) technology and urban air mobility solutions, meeting increasing demand for faster, congestion-free transport.
